violations.text: No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Sausage breakfast sandwich was observed held at 107 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Sandwiches were taken to get reheated. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the iced coffee machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Eggs observed held at 96-117 degrees Fahrenheit in backup hot hold box. Egg sandwiches observed held at 118-127 in display hot hold unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC voluntarily disposed of eggs as time of preparation was unknown. Sandwiches were reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
Sanitizer was in excess of recommended parts per million. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Ice scoop observed stored with the handle in the ice. Utensils must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container, or in a clean dry locations. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in areas of the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on beverages in the storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2025

Bakery items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment provided binder of each product and ingredients for consumer display at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/21/2023
